languages.text: "Почтенное технобратство проводит церемонию высшей похвалы мирянину, угадавшему путь {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинного духа{/g}. Владельцы {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментаций{/g} благодарны вам за рациональное распоряжение железной плотью. Они... даже вплели в техно-лингву ваше имя. Насколько мне известно, алое жречество редко оказывает кому-либо подобную честь".

traits.locale_text: "Почтенное технобратство проводит церемонию высшей похвалы мирянину, угадавшему путь {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}текст{/g}машинного духа. Владельцы {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментаций{/g} благодарны вам за рациональное распоряжение железной плотью. Они... даже вплели в техно-лингву ваше имя. Насколько мне известно, алое жречество редко оказывают кому-либо подобную честь".
traits.speaker: VoxMaster

languages.text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests are performing a ceremony of supreme praise for the layperson who divined the path of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g}. The wearers of {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} are grateful to you for your rational decisions regarding the use of iron flesh. They... have even embedded your name in their Techna-Lingua. To my knowledge, the crimson priesthood rarely bestows such an honour on anyone."
languages.original_text: "Почтенное технобратство проводит церемонию высшей похвалы мирянину, угадавшему путь {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}машинного духа{/g}. Владельцы {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментаций{/g} благодарны вам за рациональное распоряжение железной плотью. Они... даже вплели в техно-лингву ваше имя. Насколько мне известно, алое жречество редко оказывает кому-либо подобную честь".

languages.text: 「尊敬されるテク・プリーストが、機械霊の道を解き明かした一般の人への最高賛辞の儀式を行っています。増幅器を身につけている者は、彼らの体内に埋め込まれた神聖な機械を鎮めたことに感謝しています。彼らは... あなたの名前をテクナ・リンガにまで刻み込んだのです。私の知る限り、赤色の教団は、このような栄誉をほとんどの人に与えません」
languages.original_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests are performing a ceremony of supreme praise for the layperson who divined the path of the machine spirit. The wearers of augmentations are grateful to you for placating the sacred machines embedded in their bodies. They... have even embedded your name in their Techna-Lingua. To my knowledge, the crimson priesthood rarely bestows such an honour on anyone."

languages.text: "Saygıdeğer Tekno Rahipler, {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhunun{/g} yolunu keşfeden sıradan bir kimseye yüce övgü töreni gerçekleştiriyor. {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Ogmentasyon{/g} sahipleri, demir etlerin kullanımıyla ilgili rasyonel kararlarınız için size minnettar. Onlar... Lingua Techna'ya adınızı bile yerleştirmiş. Bildiğim kadarıyla kızıl rahiplik, nadiren kimseye böyle bir onur bahşeder."
languages.original_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests are performing a ceremony of supreme praise for the layperson who divined the path of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g}. The wearers of {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} are grateful to you for your rational decisions regarding the use of iron flesh. They... have even embedded your name in their Techna-Lingua. To my knowledge, the crimson priesthood rarely bestows such an honour on anyone."

traits.locale_text: "Saygıdeğer Tekno Rahipler, {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}makine ruhunun{/g} yolunu keşfeden sıradan bir kimseye yüce övgü töreni gerçekleştiriyor. {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Ogmentasyon{/g} sahipleri, demir etlerin kullanımıyla ilgili rasyonel kararlarınız için size minnettar. Onlar... Lingua Techna'ya adınızı bile yerleştirmiş. Bildiğim kadarıyla kızıl rahiplik, nadiren kimseye böyle bir onur bahşeder."

languages.text: “尊贵的技术神甫们正在为洞悉{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}之道的教外人士举行至高祝颂仪式。接受了{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}改造的人们感激您在钢铁血肉使用方面做出的理性决定。他们……甚至已将您的名号编码进科技之语中。据我所知，红衣神甫极少授予他人此等殊荣。”
languages.original_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests are performing a ceremony of supreme praise for the layperson who divined the path of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g}. The wearers of {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} are grateful to you for your rational decisions regarding the use of iron flesh. They... have even embedded your name in their Techna-Lingua. To my knowledge, the crimson priesthood rarely bestows such an honour on anyone."

traits.locale_text: “尊贵的技术神甫们正在为洞悉{g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}机魂{/g}之道的教外人士举行至高祝颂仪式。接受了{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}改造的人们感激您在钢铁血肉使用方面做出的理性决定。他们……甚至已将您的名号编码进科技之语中。据我所知，红衣神甫极少授予他人此等殊荣。”

languages.text: "Die geschätzten Techpriester preisen mittels einer Zeremonie {mf|den Laien, der|die Laiin, die}den Weg des {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeistes{/g} vorausgeahnt hat. Die Träger von {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} danken Euch für Eure rationalen Entscheidungen hinsichtlich der Nutzung von ehernem Fleisch. Sie ... haben sogar Euren Namen in ihre Lingua technis eingebettet. Meines Wissen gewährt die rote Priesterschaft diese Ehre nur selten."
languages.original_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests are performing a ceremony of supreme praise for the layperson who divined the path of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g}. The wearers of {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} are grateful to you for your rational decisions regarding the use of iron flesh. They... have even embedded your name in their Techna-Lingua. To my knowledge, the crimson priesthood rarely bestows such an honour on anyone."

traits.locale_text: "Die geschätzten Techpriester preisen mittels einer Zeremonie {mf|den Laien, der|die Laiin, die}den Weg des {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}Maschinengeistes{/g} vorausgeahnt hat. Die Träger von {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} danken Euch für Eure rationalen Entscheidungen hinsichtlich der Nutzung von ehernem Fleisch. Sie ... haben sogar Euren Namen in ihre Lingua technis eingebettet. Meines Wissen gewährt die rote Priesterschaft diese Ehre nur selten."

languages.text: « Les honorables technoprêtres accomplissent une action de grâce suprême en hommage {mf|au|à la} profane qui a su percevoir la voie de {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}l'esprit de la machine{/g}. Les porteurs d'{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} vous sont reconnaissants pour vos décisions rationnelles concernant l'utilisation de la chair de fer. Ils... ils ont même retranscrit votre nom dans leur précieux langage technique. À ma connaissance, c'est un insigne honneur que le clergé écarlate n'accorde que fort rarement. »
languages.original_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests are performing a ceremony of supreme praise for the layperson who divined the path of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g}. The wearers of {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} are grateful to you for your rational decisions regarding the use of iron flesh. They... have even embedded your name in their Techna-Lingua. To my knowledge, the crimson priesthood rarely bestows such an honour on anyone."

traits.locale_text: « Les honorables technoprêtres accomplissent une action de grâce suprême en hommage {mf|au|à la} profane qui a su percevoir la voie de {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}l'esprit de la machine{/g}. Les porteurs d'{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} vous sont reconnaissants pour vos décisions rationnelles concernant l'utilisation de la chair de fer. Ils... ils ont même retranscrit votre nom dans leur précieux langage technique. À ma connaissance, c'est un insigne honneur que le clergé écarlate n'accorde que fort rarement. »

languages.text: «Los estimados tecnosacerdotes están celebrando una ceremonia de alabanza suprema para una persona laica que ha dilucidado el camino de un {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}espíritu máquina{/g}. Los portadores de {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumentos{/g} le están agradecidos por su decisión racional acerca del uso de carne mecánica. Han... llegado a engastar su nombre en la tecnolingua. Por lo que sé, el sacerdocio carmesí no concede ese honor prácticamente nunca».
languages.original_text: "The esteemed Tech-Priests are performing a ceremony of supreme praise for the layperson who divined the path of the {g|Encyclopedia:MachineSpirit}machine spirit{/g}. The wearers of {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} are grateful to you for your rational decisions regarding the use of iron flesh. They... have even embedded your name in their Techna-Lingua. To my knowledge, the crimson priesthood rarely bestows such an honour on anyone."
